The mid palatal split after a Le-Fort 1 osteotomy typically results from the action of splitting the maxilla in an inferior direction due to the need to elevate the frontozygomatic buttress and separate the structures attached to it, particularly the orbital apex, ethmoid sinuses, and nasal cavity roof. Therefore, option B (Inferior) is correct.
